Name of the event: Stage Ready: Mastering the Art of Speaking
Event description: 🗣️ What is Toastmasters?Toastmasters International is a global nonprofit organization that helps individuals become more confident communicators and leaders. With clubs in over 140 countries, Toastmasters provides a supportive environment where members can improve their public speaking, presentation, and leadership skills through practice and constructive feedback. Please Come at Bhive Church Street - Meeting Room - Bill Gates 🎤 What Happens at a Toastmasters Event?A typical Toastmasters event is a structured meeting filled with interactive segments, including:Prepared Speeches – Members deliver planned speeches on a variety of topics.Table Topics – Impromptu speaking exercises that boost your thinking and speaking on your feet.Speech Evaluations – Constructive feedback to help speakers grow and improve.Role Plays – Members take on roles such as Timekeeper, Grammarian, and Ah-Counter to build awareness and discipline.🌟 Why Attend a Toastmasters Event?Whether you`re a seasoned speaker or just starting out, Toastmasters is a safe, encouraging space to:Build self-confidence in public speakingImprove your communication styleLearn leadership by doingNetwork with professionals from diverse backgrounds🙌 Be a Part of the ExperienceJoin us for an engaging and fun-filled session where you can observe, learn, and even participate! Everyone is welcome — you don’t need to be a member to attend.Read More

Event description: 🎨 Textured Painting at Fabrizo! 🎨Do you know why getting involved in art, craft, or any kind of motor-skill activity is so important for every human being?Because we live in a world that moves too fast. We rush through our days, eat fast food, stay glued to our phones, and barely find time for ourselves. In this hectic lifestyle, our minds rarely get a moment to breathe.That’s exactly where art and craft play a magical role.These activities improve our motor skills, teach us patience, and gently guide our minds into a space of calm and focus. When your hands are busy creating, your mind feels lighter, quieter, and happier. Art helps you slow down, reconnect with your inner self, and fall in love with who you are.It’s more than a hobby —it’s a beautiful pause from the chaos, and a gift you give to your own mind and soul Kindly note: We are an art and craft centre offering multiple activities, including baking sessions and indoor games. As we host several bookings at the same time, there may occasionally be a short wait before we are able to begin your activity. We sincerely request your patience and understanding while we ensure everyone receives a comfortable and enjoyable experience. Thank you for your cooperation and support. ✨Read More

Event description: In his brand-new comedy hour, Anand Rathnam returns with a gloriously chaotic tour through the things that annoy him, delight him, and make him question his life choices.From YouTube ads that interrupt his peace (and possibly his will to live), to a dog who seems determined to injure himself purely for comedic timing, Anand has his hands full. Add in the surprising confidence boost of discovering grey hair—and embracing it like a low-budget silver fox—and you’ve got a man on the brink… but laughing anyway.And of course, there’s Anand’s undying love for movies, which has taught him everything from drama to delusion.Smart, silly, honest, and relentlessly funny, this show is for anyone who’s ever been irritated by the internet, embarrassed by a pet, betrayed by their own body, or saved by the magic of cinema.Read More
